title: Irish Chicken Skewers
description: A delicious and easy-to-make recipe that combines the flavors of Ireland with the convenience of chicken skewers. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Thread chicken, racy sauce, and irish seasoning blend onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until chicken is cooked through and reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
Let skewers rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
